# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup

Resources:
  MySNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: "My SNS Topic"
      Subscription:
        - Endpoint: !Sub "arn:aws:sqs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${MySQSQueue.Name}"
          Protocol: "sqs"

  MySQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: "MySQSQueue"
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600 # 4 days in seconds
      VisibilityTimeout: 30 # 30 seconds

  MyQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref MySQSQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - SQS:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                AWS:SourceArn: !Ref MySNSTopic

Outputs:
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: "ARN of the SNS Topic"
    Value: !Ref MySNSTopic

  SQSQueueUrl:
    Description: "URL of the SQS Queue"
    Value: !Ref MySQSQueue

  SQSQueueArn:
    Description: "ARN of the SQS Queue"
    Value: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn
